verdict: Exceptional formula with triple ceramides and cholesterol that restore skin barrier function. This is a gold-standard budget moisturizer backed by extensive clinical research and consumer validation.

_research.name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream
pros: Clinically proven barrier repair with ceramide complex
Fragrance-free and hypoallergenic for sensitive skin
Affordable price with massive review volume (15800+)
_research.con: Rich texture may feel heavy for oily or acne-prone skin types.
